description: Closed verb taxonomy for manual action annotation spans. All span.action values MUST be one of these ids.

actions.definition: Hand moves toward a target object or location without contact.
actions.hand_typical: Open hand, palm facing target, fingers extended but relaxed.

actions.definition: Fingers close around or pinch an object to establish grip.
actions.hand_typical: Fingers curl inward toward palm; thumb opposes fingers for pinch.

actions.definition: Hand moves upward while maintaining grip on an object, raising it against gravity.
actions.hand_typical: Grip maintained; wrist and forearm apply upward force.

actions.definition: Static grip maintained on an object without significant movement.
actions.hand_typical: Fingers wrapped around object; minimal motion; sustained grip.

actions.definition: Hand moves an object to a target location and releases, or inserts into a receptacle.
actions.hand_typical: Grip maintained during approach, then fingers open to release.

actions.definition: Hand applies force to translate an object away from or toward the body.
actions.hand_typical: Palm or fingertips contact object; arm applies linear force.

actions.definition: Hand applies torque to rotate an object around an axis.
actions.hand_typical: Wrist pronation/supination or forearm rotation while grip is maintained.

actions.definition: Hand operates a hinged or sliding mechanism (door, lid, drawer, valve).
actions.hand_typical: Grip on handle or edge; coordinated arm trajectory along mechanism path.

actions.definition: Fingers open to voluntarily release a held object.
actions.hand_typical: Fingers extend and spread; thumb abducts; object exits palm.

actions.definition: Fingertip or palm applies normal force to a surface or slides along it.
actions.hand_typical: Single finger or palm contacts surface; normal or tangential force applied.

actions.definition: Hand tilts a container to transfer its contents (liquid, granular) to another receptacle.
actions.hand_typical: Grip around container body; wrist rotates to tilt; coordinated with other hand for stabilization.

actions.definition: Both hands work together on a single task, each performing a distinct sub-action.
actions.hand_typical: One hand stabilizes or holds while the other manipulates; or both hands cooperate symmetrically.

actions.definition: Hand manipulates a tool (hammer, pen, scissors, etc.) to act on another object or surface.
actions.hand_typical: Grip adapted to tool geometry; power grip for hammer, precision grip for pen.

actions.definition: Hand is at rest or not engaged in any manipulation task; no active object interaction.
actions.hand_typical: Hand relaxed, open or lightly closed; no object contact; may be resting on surface.
